---
title: "Opferformel"
---

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```

![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0010_Htp-dj-nsw_AR-MR_01.png){.glyph} *ḥtp-di-nsw* [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/02_dj/0001_dj_01.png){.glyph} (*di*) [Gaben](../slots/gaben.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gaben} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/03_n-kA-n/0001_n-kA-n_01.png){.glyph} *n* / *n kꜣ n* [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person}   




## Übersetzung

Ein Opfer, das der König [Gottheit](../slots/gottheit.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gottheit} gibt. Er/sie möge(n) geben ein Anrufungsopfer bestehend aus [Gaben](../slots/gaben.qmd){.slot-link .slot-gaben} für / für den Ka des/der [Person](../slots/person.qmd){.slot-link .slot-person}

## Aufbau

<div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> WB </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Kommentar </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥtp-di-nsw (n)* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Ein Opfer, das der König gibt </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> III: 186–187 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> häufige Schreibung; ab 19. Dyn. auch mit „n“ vor Gottheit geschrieben </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *di⸗f / ⸗s / ⸗sn pr.t-ḫrw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Er/Sie (Sg. & Pl.) möge(n) geben </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> III: 186–187 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *n / n kꜣ n* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> für / für den Ka des/der </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> III: 186 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>

## Kommentare

[Person](../slots/person.qmd){.slot-link .slot-person} NN = Verstorbene(r)

## Schreibvarianten

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*ḥtp-di-nsw*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/850653' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 850653' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 850653 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>850653</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0010_Htp-dj-nsw_AR-MR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0020_Htp-dj-nsw n_Ende-NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Ende NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0030_Htp-dj-nsw_NR-Spaet._01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Spät.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0040_Htp-dj-nsw_AR-MR-Gott-N-di_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0050_Htp-dj-nsw_AR-MR-Gott-N-Htp-dj_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; MR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0060_Htp-dj-nsw_AR-MR-Gott-N-Htp_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(AR; MR)</sup>

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*di⸗f* / *⸗s* / *⸗sn*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/96700' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 96700' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 96700 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>96700</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/02_dj/0010_dj=f_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/02_dj/0020_dj=s_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/02_dj/0030_dj=sn_01.png){.glyph}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*n* / *n kꜣ n*</em>:</span><span class='glyphvariant-tla'><span class='tla-table-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/162870' class='tla-badge-table' title='TLA-Lemma 162870' aria-label='TLA-Lemma 162870 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>162870</a></span></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/03_n-kA-n/0001_n-kA-n_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/03_n-kA-n/0010_n-kA -n_02.png){.glyph}


:::



## Literatur

Barta, Winfried. 1968. Aufbau und Bedeutung der altägyptischen Opferformel. Ägyptologische forschungen 24. J. J. Augustin.<br>
Lapp, Günther. 1986. Die Opferformel des Alten Reiches: unter Berücksichtigung einiger späterer Formen. Sonderschrift, Deutsches Archäologisches Institut, Abteilung Kairo 21. Philipp von Zabern.



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  root.style.setProperty('--base-scale', String(scale));

  /*
   * Explicitly resize glyphs and row spacing.
   * Base glyph height: 30px
   * Base row gap: 7.2px
   */
  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-height',
    `${30 * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-row-gap',
    `${7.2 * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', String(scale));

  document.querySelectorAll('.zoom-controls button').forEach(button => {
    button.classList.toggle(
      'active',
      Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
    );
  });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem('site-zoom') || 1
  );

  /*
   * Call the complete function here.
   * Do not restore only --base-scale, because the glyph-specific
   * variables must also be restored.
   */
  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```
